title: Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets
content:

{{Quote|We, the members of the Rebel Alliance, formally announce our intention to restore the glory of the Old Republic… to create a ''New'' Republic. Where Palpatine failed to serve his people, we intend to restore the freedoms he so casually dismissed. The Alliance of Free Planets, freely offers membership to any world that wishes to throw off the Empire's yoke and take up the struggle to end the nightmare of the New Order.|The Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets|<ref name="Truce at Bakura" />}}
The '''Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets''' was the founding document of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], the short-lived transitional government of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The Declaration was issued as a result of the [[First Conference of Free Peoples]], which was held within the first days of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Death/Legends|death]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The declaration opened with a statement on the subject of Palpatine's death and his transgressions against the people of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and followed with a formal announcement of the Rebel Alliance's intention to form a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="Truce at Bakura" />

The rest of the declaration consisted primarily of five pledges:
*'''Military Action''': The Alliance of Free Planets would refrain from military actions in or near civilian areas, though battle stations and garrisons would continue to be viable military targets.<ref name="Truce at Bakura" />
*'''Equality Among Species''': The Alliance of Free Planets would welcome any individual, regardless of [[Species/Legends|species]], who wished to join the alliance.<ref name="Truce at Bakura" />
*'''Social Responsibility''': The Alliance of Free Planets sought to restore the principles of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and thus intended to restore free expression among its citizens, media, and arts.<ref name="Truce at Bakura" />
*'''Tolerance''': The Alliance of Free Planets would not tolerate any further attempts by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to conquer or otherwise destroy planetary civilizations, and would meet such efforts with military force.<ref name="Truce at Bakura" />
*'''Morality''': The Alliance of Free Planets hoped to create a more open society and a government accountable to its citizens' will.<ref name="Truce at Bakura" />

Nine individuals were the primary signatories of the Declaration: [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], [[Kerrithrarr/Legends|Kerrithrarr]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Doman Beruss (Corellian)|Doman Beruss]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], [[Jenssar SoBilles]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], [[Borsk Fey'lya]] of [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], [[Verrinnefra B'thog Indriummsegh]] of [[Elom/Legends|Elom]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], and [[Sian Tevv/Legends|Sian Tevv]] of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]].<ref name="Truce at Bakura" /> The Declaration and the Alliance were intended only as an interim phase between the Rebel Alliance and the functional government of the New Republic, and the Alliance served to organize worlds that were petitioning for inclusion in the New Republic.<ref name="Alliance CSWE">{{CSWECite|I||Alliance of Free Planets}}</ref> The [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|Declaration of a New Republic]] followed four weeks after the Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets.<ref name="CSWE DNR">{{CSWECite|I||Declaration of a New Republic}}</ref>
